semantic.role: Core TypeScript type definitions that establish the data contracts for the ArchSpine pipeline stages (scan, extraction, fix, commit, view derivation) and aggregate task state tracking.
responsibilities: Define TaskStats interface for tracking pipeline task counts and token usage.
Define TaskStageMetric interface for per-stage metrics.
Define TaskDiagnosticsState, TaskSelectionState, TaskArtifactsState, TaskTelemetryState to represent various aspects of task state.
Define TaskState as the aggregate container for all task state facets.
Define ScanStageInput and ScanStageOutput to contract the scan pipeline stage.
Define ExtractionStageOutput to contract the AST extraction stage.
Define FixViolation, FixStageInput, FixStageOutput to contract the fix pipeline stage.
Define CommitStageOutput to contract the commit stage.
Define ViewDerivationStageOutput to contract the view derivation stage.
outOfScope: Contains no implementation logic, algorithms, or processing.
Does not interact with external systems, CLI, or configuration.
Re-exports of third-party symbols are not present.
invariants: This module only depends on other core and type protocol modules; it does not import any CLI entry code, satisfying the core-pipeline-isolation rule.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Define the type contracts for the ArchSpine pipeline stages and aggregate task state, ensuring type safety and stage isolation.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era

publicSurface.description: Tracks aggregate counts of processed, skipped, and failed tasks along with token usage across a pipeline run.
Captures metrics for a specific pipeline stage, such as duration or counts.
Holds diagnostic information for a task, including errors and warnings.
Records which tasks have been selected for processing or skipping.
Stores artifacts produced by a task, such as files or data structures.
Carries telemetry data associated with a task, e.g., duration or token counts.
Aggregate state combining diagnostics, selection, artifacts, and telemetry for a single task.
Input contract for the scan stage, specifying what to scan.
Output contract for the scan stage, containing scanned file information.
Output contract for the AST extraction stage, providing extracted symbols and structure.
Represents a single rule violation detected and targeted for automatic fixing.
Input contract for the fix stage, specifying violations to fix.
Output contract for the fix stage, detailing applied fixes and their results.
Output contract for the commit stage, indicating what was committed.
Output contract for the view derivation stage, providing derived view data.
